messages.content:
I'll start by loading the execution-trace skill as required before proceeding with any other steps.

Now loading the report-analyzer skill:





Now I'll analyze the document from the URL provided and generate the 8 structured records per the BloomCell report-analyzer framework. The document is a **TD Chart Note (Redacted)** — a clinical/lab chart note. Based on the document content and BloomCell framework, here are the 8 structured analysis objects:



Now storing each record. Creating record 1 of 8:✅ Record 1 saved. Creating record 2 of 8:✅ Record 2 saved. Creating record 3 of 8:✅ Record 3 saved. Creating record 4 of 8:✅ Record 4 saved. Creating record 5 of 8:✅ Record 5 saved. Creating record 6 of 8:✅ Record 6 saved. Creating record 7 of 8:✅ Record 7 saved. Creating record 8 of 8:

8 records saved successfully.

Now updating the original PatientDocument:



Document updated successfully.
